creator: marcarianalexandru@gmail.com
text:
The build fails now with the following error: 
": Error from apache.mk. Illegal use of USES= apache:run,24+"

After reverting to the previous setting - APACHE_USE= APACHE_RUN=24+, the build fails again but with a different error: 

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)

===>  Building package for py39-viewvc-devel-1.3.0.20230104

pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/viewvc-devel/work-py39/stage/usr/local/viewvc/bin/loginfo-handler:No such file or directory

Thanks very much!
